nodes.context: A criminal gang operating in the Lower Mainland, involved in drug trafficking and known for requiring members to have Chinese character tattoos.
A criminal gang in the Lower Mainland that the Bacon brothers partnered with and later took leadership of.
A puppet gang of the Hells Angels involved in the Lower Mainland gang war.
An outlaw motorcycle gang that orchestrated the Bacon brothers' takeover of the Red Scorpions and supplied guns to rival gangs.
A gang allied with the United Nations gang against the Red Scorpions during the Lower Mainland gang war.
A gang founded by Corey Jason Lal and Edward Narong after breaking away from the Red Scorpions; was exterminated in the Surrey Six massacre.
A trio of gangsters from Abbotsford, British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and homicides.
A Calgary-based gang whose members were recruited to kill the Bacon brothers.
A gang led by Barzan Tilli-Choli, involved in conflict with the Bacon brothers.
A gang to which the Bacon brothers and other members belonged.
Outlaw motorcycle gang operating in Canada, involved in the Wolfpack Alliance.
Canadian street gang, acted as proxy for Hells Angels.
Trio of gangsters from Abbotsford, British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Canadian street gang, described as docile and malleable compared to UN.
Canadian gang, described as increasingly independent and unreliable.
Loose alliance of gangsters formed in 2010, including Hells Angels, Independent Soldiers, Bacon Brothers, and others.
Criminal family from Montreal and Ottawa, member of Wolfpack Alliance.
Montreal-based gang, member of Wolfpack Alliance via Shane Maloney.
Canadian gang co-bossed by Gurmit Singh Dhak and Sandip Duhre, allied with United Nations gang.
A trio of gangsters from Abbotsford, British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and homicides.
A criminal organization in Western Canada.
A notorious criminal organization, often described as such by the parole board.
A criminal organization condemned by Jamie Bacon.
An Indo-Canadian gang condemned by Jamie Bacon.

edges.evidence_quote: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) believed the Bacon brothers were working with the United Nations gang.
edges.context: The Bacon brothers worked with the United Nations gang, but held them in contempt.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2006, the brothers partnered with the Red Scorpions gang to help them compete with the United Nations gang.
edges.context: The Bacon brothers partnered with the Red Scorpions and later took leadership control.

edges.evidence_quote: The Lower Mainland was gripped by a gang war from 2007 to 2009 as the Red Scorpions fought the United Nations gang
edges.context: The Red Scorpions and United Nations gang were at war from 2007 to 2009.

edges.evidence_quote: It is believed that the Bacon brothers' take-over of the Red Scorpions was orchestrated by the Hells Angels to reduce the Red Scorpions down to a Hells Angels puppet gang.
edges.context: The Hells Angels orchestrated the Bacon brothers' takeover to make the Red Scorpions a puppet gang.

edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels and their puppet gang, the Independent Soldiers
edges.context: The Independent Soldiers were a puppet gang of the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Allied with the United Nations gang against the Red Scorpions was the Dhak-Duhre gang.
edges.context: The Dhak-Duhre gang was allied with the United Nations gang against the Red Scorpions.

edges.evidence_quote: The newly founded Lal gang had been 'exterminated' in its entirety with the Surrey Six massacre.
edges.context: The Red Scorpions (led by Jamie Bacon) exterminated the Lal gang in the Surrey Six massacre.

edges.evidence_quote: In early 2008, Clayton Roueche recruited two members of Calgary's Fresh Off the Boat Killers gang, namely Billy Ly and Troy Tran, to come to the Lower Mainland to kill the Bacon brothers.
edges.context: Fresh Off the Boat Killers members were recruited to assassinate the Bacon brothers.

edges.evidence_quote: Tilli-Choli, who became the most tenacious opponent of the Bacon brothers, was known for the 'human safaris' as he would spend hours cruising the Lower Mainland in his automobile looking for the Bacon brothers and other members of the Red Scorpions gang.
edges.context: The UN gang, led by Tilli-Choli, actively hunted and attempted to kill the Bacon brothers.

edges.evidence_quote: Jamie did not resist arrest and was led into a police cruiser wearing his Red Scorpions hoodie and track pants.
edges.context: The Bacon brothers were members of the Red Scorpions gang.

edges.evidence_quote: the Independent Soldiers (acting, as they always did, as the Hells Angels' proxy)
edges.context: Independent Soldiers acted as proxy for Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: luring the Bacon Brothers away from the increasingly independent and unreliable UN to the more docile and malleable Red Scorpions
edges.context: Bacon Brothers were lured to align with Red Scorpions.

edges.evidence_quote: luring the Bacon Brothers away from the increasingly independent and unreliable UN
edges.context: Bacon Brothers were previously aligned with the United Nations gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.
edges.context: Hells Angels member Larry Amero was a founding member of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.
edges.context: Independent Soldiers members James Riach and Randy Naicker were founding members of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.
edges.context: Jonathan Bacon of the Bacon Brothers was a founding member of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Other members of the Wolfpack Alliance were the Alkhalil family of Montreal and Ottawa
edges.context: Alkhalil family was a member of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Other members of the Wolfpack Alliance were ... Shane Maloney of the Montreal's West End Gang
edges.context: West End Gang member Shane Maloney was part of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Dhak-Duhre group was allied with the United Nations gang.
edges.context: Dhak-Duhre gang was allied with the United Nations gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Sukhveer 'Sukh' Dhak, the younger brother of Gurmit, believed that the Wolfpack gang and that Amero, Riach, and Jonathan Bacon in particular were the ones responsible for his brother's murder.
edges.context: Wolfpack Alliance was believed responsible for murder of Gurmit Dhak, leading to conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: File information reveals that you are identified as a member of the Red Scorpions and the Bacon Brothers organization
edges.context: Jarrod Bacon is identified as a member of both the Red Scorpions and the Bacon Brothers organization.

edges.evidence_quote: which is very influential in Western Canada, and has links with a notorious criminal organization
edges.context: The Bacon Brothers organization has links with the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance together with the Indo-Canadian Brothers' Keepers gang in racist and homophobic language.
edges.context: Jamie Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance together with the Indo-Canadian Brothers' Keepers gang in racist and homophobic language.
edges.context: Jamie Bacon condemned the Brothers' Keepers gang.
